step.title: Step
step.description: The number of steps that were used to train this embedding, if available

sd_checkpoint.title: SD Checkpoint
sd_checkpoint.description: The hash of the checkpoint this embedding was trained on, if available

sd_checkpoint_name.title: SD Checkpoint Name
sd_checkpoint_name.description: The name of the checkpoint this embedding was trained on, if available. Note that this is the name that was used by the trainer; for a stable identifier, use `sd_checkpoint` instead

shape.title: Shape
shape.description: The length of each individual vector in the embedding

vectors.title: Vectors
vectors.description: The number of vectors in the embedding

loaded.title: Loaded
loaded.description: Embeddings loaded for the current model

skipped.title: Skipped
skipped.description: Embeddings skipped for the current model (likely due to architecture incompatibility)

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Flag specifying whether this extension is enabled

resize_mode.title: Resize Mode
resize_mode.description: Sets the resize mode: 0 to upscale by upscaling_resize amount, 1 to upscale up to upscaling_resize_h x upscaling_resize_w.

show_extras_results.title: Show results
show_extras_results.description: Should the backend return the generated image?

gfpgan_visibility.title: GFPGAN Visibility
gfpgan_visibility.description: Sets the visibility of GFPGAN, values should be between 0 and 1.

codeformer_visibility.title: CodeFormer Visibility
codeformer_visibility.description: Sets the visibility of CodeFormer, values should be between 0 and 1.

codeformer_weight.title: CodeFormer Weight
codeformer_weight.description: Sets the weight of CodeFormer, values should be between 0 and 1.

upscaling_resize.title: Upscaling Factor
upscaling_resize.description: By how much to upscale the image, only used when resize_mode=0.

upscaling_resize_w.title: Target Width
upscaling_resize_w.description: Target width for the upscaler to hit. Only used when resize_mode=1.

upscaling_resize_h.title: Target Height
upscaling_resize_h.description: Target height for the upscaler to hit. Only used when resize_mode=1.

upscaling_crop.title: Crop to fit
upscaling_crop.description: Should the upscaler crop the image to fit in the chosen size?

upscaler_1.title: Main upscaler
upscaler_1.description: The name of the main upscaler to use, it has to be one of this list:

upscaler_2.title: Secondary upscaler
upscaler_2.description: The name of the secondary upscaler to use, it has to be one of this list:

extras_upscaler_2_visibility.title: Secondary upscaler visibility
extras_upscaler_2_visibility.description: Sets the visibility of secondary upscaler, values should be between 0 and 1.

upscale_first.title: Upscale first
upscale_first.description: Should the upscaler run before restoring faces?

imageList.title: Images
imageList.description: List of images to work on. Must be Base64 strings

html_info.title: HTML info
html_info.description: A series of HTML tags containing the process info.

images.description: The generated images in base64 format.

image.title: Image
image.description: Image to work on, must be a Base64 string containing the image's data.

image.title: Image

update_all_extensions.title: Update All Extensions
update_all_extensions.description: launch.py argument: download updates for all extensions when starting the program

skip_python_version_check.title: Skip Python Version Check
skip_python_version_check.description: launch.py argument: do not check python version

skip_prepare_environment.title: Skip Prepare Environment
skip_prepare_environment.description: launch.py argument: skip all environment preparation

skip_torch_cuda_test.title: Skip Torch Cuda Test
skip_torch_cuda_test.description: launch.py argument: do not check if CUDA is able to work properly

skip_install.title: Skip Install
skip_install.description: launch.py argument: skip installation of packages

reinstall_xformers.title: Reinstall Xformers
reinstall_xformers.description: launch.py argument: install the appropriate version of xformers even if you have some version already installed

reinstall_torch.title: Reinstall Torch
reinstall_torch.description: launch.py argument: install the appropriate version of torch even if you have some version already installed

log_startup.title: Log Startup
log_startup.description: launch.py argument: print a detailed log of what's happening at startup

dump_sysinfo.title: Dump Sysinfo
dump_sysinfo.description: launch.py argument: dump limited sysinfo file (without information about extensions, options) to disk and quit

loglevel.title: Loglevel
loglevel.description: log level; one of: CRITICAL, ERROR, WARNING, INFO, DEBUG

data_dir.title: Data Dir
data_dir.description: base path where all user data is stored

config.title: Config
config.description: path to config which constructs model

ckpt.title: Ckpt
ckpt.description: path to checkpoint of stable diffusion model; if specified, this checkpoint will be added to the list of checkpoints and loaded

ckpt_dir.title: Ckpt Dir
ckpt_dir.description: Path to directory with stable diffusion checkpoints

vae_dir.title: Vae Dir
vae_dir.description: Path to directory with VAE files

no_half.title: No Half
no_half.description: do not switch the model to 16-bit floats

share.title: Share
share.description: use share=True for gradio and make the UI accessible through their site

ngrok_options.title: Ngrok Options
ngrok_options.description: The options to pass to ngrok in JSON format, e.g.: '{"authtoken_from_env":true, "basic_auth":"user:password", "oauth_provider":"google", "oauth_allow_emails":"user@asdf.com"}'

enable_insecure_extension_access.title: Enable Insecure Extension Access
enable_insecure_extension_access.description: enable extensions tab regardless of other options

codeformer_models_path.title: Codeformer Models Path
codeformer_models_path.description: Path to directory with codeformer model file(s).

gfpgan_models_path.title: Gfpgan Models Path
gfpgan_models_path.description: Path to directory with GFPGAN model file(s).

esrgan_models_path.title: Esrgan Models Path
esrgan_models_path.description: Path to directory with ESRGAN model file(s).

onnxruntime_gpu.title: Onnxruntime Gpu
onnxruntime_gpu.description: install nightly onnxruntime-gpu with cu130 support

disable_nan_check.title: Disable Nan Check
disable_nan_check.description: do not check if produced images/latent spaces have nans; useful for running without a checkpoint in CI

use_cpu.title: Use Cpu
use_cpu.description: use CPU as torch device for specified modules

use_ipex.title: Use Ipex
use_ipex.description: use Intel XPU as torch device

listen.title: Listen
listen.description: launch gradio with 0.0.0.0 as server name, allowing to respond to network requests

port.title: Port
port.description: launch gradio with given server port, you need root/admin rights for ports < 1024, defaults to 7860 if available

ui_config_file.title: Ui Config File
ui_config_file.description: filename to use for ui configuration

freeze_settings.title: Freeze Settings
freeze_settings.description: disable editing of all settings globally

freeze_settings_in_sections.title: Freeze Settings In Sections
freeze_settings_in_sections.description: disable editing settings in specific sections of the settings page by specifying a comma-delimited list such like "saving-images,upscaling". The list of setting names can be found in the modules/shared_options.py file

freeze_specific_settings.title: Freeze Specific Settings
freeze_specific_settings.description: disable editing of individual settings by specifying a comma-delimited list like "samples_save,samples_format". The list of setting names can be found in the config.json file

ui_settings_file.title: Ui Settings File
ui_settings_file.description: filename to use for ui settings

gradio_auth.title: Gradio Auth
gradio_auth.description: set gradio authentication like "username:password"; or comma-delimit multiple like "u1:p1,u2:p2,u3:p3"

gradio_auth_path.title: Gradio Auth Path
gradio_auth_path.description: set gradio authentication file path ex. "/path/to/auth/file" same auth format as --gradio-auth

gradio_allowed_path.title: Gradio Allowed Path
gradio_allowed_path.description: add path to gradio's allowed_paths, make it possible to serve files from it

styles_file.title: Styles File
styles_file.description: path or wildcard path of styles files, allow multiple entries.

autolaunch.title: Autolaunch
autolaunch.description: open the webui URL in the system's default browser upon launch

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: launches the UI with light or dark theme

use_textbox_seed.title: Use Textbox Seed
use_textbox_seed.description: use textbox for seeds in UI (no up/down, but possible to input long seeds)

disable_console_progressbars.title: Disable Console Progressbars
disable_console_progressbars.description: do not output progressbars to console

vae_path.title: Vae Path
vae_path.description: Checkpoint to use as VAE; setting this argument disables all settings related to VAE

api.title: Api
api.description: use api=True to launch the API together with the webui (use --nowebui instead for only the API)

api_auth.title: Api Auth
api_auth.description: Set authentication for API like "username:password"; or comma-delimit multiple like "u1:p1,u2:p2,u3:p3"

api_log.title: Api Log
api_log.description: use api-log=True to enable logging of all API requests

nowebui.title: Nowebui
nowebui.description: use api=True to launch the API instead of the webui

ui_debug_mode.title: Ui Debug Mode
ui_debug_mode.description: Don't load model to quickly launch UI

device_id.title: Device Id
device_id.description: Select the default CUDA device to use (export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,etc might be needed before)

cors_allow_origins.title: Cors Allow Origins
cors_allow_origins.description: Allowed CORS origin(s) in the form of a comma-separated list (no spaces)

cors_allow_origins_regex.title: Cors Allow Origins Regex
cors_allow_origins_regex.description: Allowed CORS origin(s) in the form of a single regular expression

tls_keyfile.title: Tls Keyfile
tls_keyfile.description: Partially enables TLS, requires --tls-certfile to fully function

tls_certfile.title: Tls Certfile
tls_certfile.description: Partially enables TLS, requires --tls-keyfile to fully function

disable_tls_verify.title: Disable Tls Verify
disable_tls_verify.description: When passed, enables the use of self-signed certificates.

no_gradio_queue.title: No Gradio Queue
no_gradio_queue.description: Disables gradio queue; causes the webpage to use http requests instead of websockets; was the default in earlier versions

skip_version_check.title: Skip Version Check
skip_version_check.description: Do not check versions of torch and xformers

no_hashing.title: No Hashing
no_hashing.description: disable sha256 hashing of checkpoints to help loading performance

no_download_sd_model.title: No Download Sd Model
no_download_sd_model.description: don't download SD1.5 model even if no model is found in --ckpt-dir

subpath.title: Subpath
subpath.description: customize the subpath for gradio, use with reverse proxy

disable_all_extensions.title: Disable All Extensions
disable_all_extensions.description: prevent all extensions from running regardless of any other settings

disable_extra_extensions.title: Disable Extra Extensions
disable_extra_extensions.description: prevent all extensions except built-in from running regardless of any other settings

forge_ref_a1111_home.title: Forge Ref A1111 Home
forge_ref_a1111_home.description: Look for models in an existing A1111 checkout's path

controlnet_dir.title: Controlnet Dir
controlnet_dir.description: Path to directory with ControlNet models

controlnet_preprocessor_models_dir.description: Path to directory with annotator model directories

adv_xyz.title: Adv Xyz
adv_xyz.description: show non-UI parameters in X/Y/Z Plot options

uv_symlink.title: Uv Symlink
uv_symlink.description: Use the uv package manager with symlink

image_browser_tmp_db.title: Image Browser Tmp Db
image_browser_tmp_db.description: Copy database file to and from /tmp when transacting (workaround for filesystems sqlite does not support)

lora_dir.title: Lora Dir
lora_dir.description: Path to directory with LoRA networks

controlnet_loglevel.title: Controlnet Loglevel
controlnet_loglevel.description: Set the log level (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL)

images.title: Image
images.description: The generated image in base64 format.

save_images_add_number.title: Save Images Add Number
save_images_add_number.description: Append an ascending number to the filename

save_images_replace_action.title: Save Images Replace Action

save_images_before_highres_fix.description: Save a copy of the image before Hires. fix

save_images_before_color_correction.title: Save Images Before Color Correction
save_images_before_color_correction.description: Save a copy of the image before color correction

save_mask_composite.description: For inpainting, save the masked composite

temp_dir.description: Directory for temporary images; leave empty to use the system TEMP folder

upscaling_max_images_in_cache.description: Number of upscaled images to cache

prefer_fp16_upscalers.description: Prefer to load Upscaler in half precision

auto_launch_browser.description: Launch the webui in browser on startup

no_flashbang.description: Force the background color of the "Reloading..." screen to be black

api_enable_requests.title: Api Enable Requests
api_enable_requests.description: Allow "http://" and "https://" URLs as input images

sd_checkpoint_cache.title: Sd Checkpoint Cache
sd_checkpoint_cache.description: Number of Checkpoints to cache in RAM

hires_fix_refiner_pass.title: Hires Fix Refiner Pass
hires_fix_refiner_pass.description: Which pass during Hires. fix to enable Refiner

sd_vae_explanation.title: Sd Vae Explanation
sd_vae_explanation.default:
<abbr title='Variational AutoEncoder'>VAE</abbr> is a neural network that transforms a standard <abbr title='Red/Green/Blue'>RGB</abbr>
image to and from latent space representation. Latent space is what Stable Diffusion works on during generation. For txt2img, VAE is used
to create the resulting image after the sampling is finished. For img2img, VAE is additionally used to process user's input image before the sampling.

sd_vae_checkpoint_cache.description: Number of VAE to cache in RAM

sd_vae_overrides_per_model_preferences.title: Sd Vae Overrides Per Model Preferences

img2img_extra_noise.description: Extra Noise Multiplier for img2img and Hires. fix

img2img_color_correction.title: Img2Img Color Correction
img2img_color_correction.description: Apply color correction to img2img results to match original colors

img2img_fix_steps.description: During img2img, do exactly the number of Steps the slider specifies

img2img_inpaint_sketch_default_brush_col.description: Initial Brush Color for Inpaint Sketch

token_merging_explanation.title: Token Merging Explanation
token_merging_explanation.default:
Token Merging speeds up the diffusion process by fusing "redundant" tokens together, but also reduces quality as a result. [GitHub]
Note: Has no effect on SDXL when Max Downsample is set to 1

extra_networks_tree_view_explanation.default: Tree View is a rather... "controversial" feature, which adds a folder structure to visualize the ExtraNetworks. However, the resulting UI is quite... sluggish.

dimensions_and_batch_together.description: Show Width/Height and Batch sliders in same row

sd_checkpoint_dropdown_use_short.title: Sd Checkpoint Dropdown Use Short
sd_checkpoint_dropdown_use_short.description: Show filenames without folder in the Checkpoint dropdown

hires_fix_show_sampler.title: Hires Fix Show Sampler
hires_fix_show_sampler.description: [Hires. fix]: Show checkpoint, sampler, scheduler, and cfg options

hires_fix_show_prompts.title: Hires Fix Show Prompts
hires_fix_show_prompts.description: [Hires. fix]: Show prompt and negative prompt textboxes

show_progress_in_title.title: Show Progress In Title
show_progress_in_title.description: Show generation progress in window title

send_seed.title: Send Seed
send_seed.description: Send the Seed information when using the "Send to" buttons

send_cfg.title: Send Cfg
send_cfg.description: Send the CFG information when using the "Send to" buttons

send_size.title: Send Size
send_size.description: Send the Resolution information when using the "Send to" buttons

infotext_explanation.title: Infotext Explanation
infotext_explanation.default: Infotext is what the webui calls the text that contains generation parameters, and can be used to generate the same image again.

enable_pnginfo.title: Enable Pnginfo
enable_pnginfo.description: Write infotext to metadata of generated images

save_txt.title: Save Txt
save_txt.description: Write infotext to a text file next to every generated image

add_user_name_to_info.title: Add User Name To Info
add_user_name_to_info.description: Add user name to infotext when authenticated

disable_weights_auto_swap.title: Disable Weights Auto Swap
disable_weights_auto_swap.description: Ignore checkpoint information when reading infotext

send_image_info_t2i_to_i2i.title: Send Image Info T2I To I2I
send_image_info_t2i_to_i2i.description: When using the "Send to img2img" button (in txt2img tab), use the parameters in the infotext rather than the UI fields

live_previews_enable.title: Live Previews Enable
live_previews_enable.description: Show live previews of images during sampling

show_progress_grid.title: Show Progress Grid
show_progress_grid.description: Show previews of all images in a batch as a grid

live_preview_fast_interrupt.title: Live Preview Fast Interrupt
live_preview_fast_interrupt.description: Return image with the selected preview method on interruption

js_live_preview_in_modal_lightbox.title: Js Live Preview In Modal Lightbox
js_live_preview_in_modal_lightbox.description: Show the live previews in full page image viewer

show_progress_every_n_steps.title: Show Progress Every N Steps
show_progress_every_n_steps.description: Generate live preview every N step

live_preview_refresh_period.title: Live Preview Refresh Period
live_preview_refresh_period.description: Progress Bar and Preview update interval

always_discard_next_to_last_sigma.title: Always Discard Next To Last Sigma

postprocessing_enable_in_main_ui.title: Postprocessing Enable In Main Ui
postprocessing_enable_in_main_ui.description: Enable Postprocessing operations in txt2img and img2img

disable_all_extensions.title: Disable All Extensions
disable_all_extensions.description: Disable all extensions (preserves the list of disabled extensions)

restore_config_state_file.title: Restore Config State File
restore_config_state_file.description: Config state file to restore from, under "config-states/" folder

sd_checkpoint_hash.title: Sd Checkpoint Hash
sd_checkpoint_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the current checkpoint

lora_preferred_name.title: Lora Preferred Name
lora_preferred_name.description: When adding syntax to prompt, refer to LoRA by

canvas_hotkey_fullscreen.title: Canvas Hotkey Fullscreen
canvas_hotkey_fullscreen.description: Fullscreen Mode, maximizes the picture so that it fits into the screen and stretches it to its full width

canvas_auto_expand.title: Canvas Auto Expand
canvas_auto_expand.description: Automatically expands an image that does not fit completely in the canvas area, similar to manually pressing the S and R buttons

canvas_blur_prompt.title: Canvas Blur Prompt
canvas_blur_prompt.description: Take the focus off the prompt when working with a canvas

canvas_disabled_functions.title: Canvas Disabled Functions
canvas_disabled_functions.description: Disable function that you don't use

settings_in_ui.title: Settings In Ui
settings_in_ui.default: This page allows you to add some settings to the main interface of txt2img and img2img tabs.

extra_options_cols.title: Extra Options Cols
extra_options_cols.description: Number of columns for added settings

extra_options_accordion.title: Extra Options Accordion
extra_options_accordion.description: Place added settings into an accordion

info.title: Image info
info.description: A string with the parameters used to generate the image

items.title: Items
items.description: A dictionary containing all the other fields the image had

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.description: A dictionary with parsed generation info fields

id_task.title: Task ID
id_task.description: id of the task to get progress for

id_live_preview.title: Live preview image ID
id_live_preview.description: id of last received last preview image

live_preview.title: Include live preview
live_preview.description: boolean flag indicating whether to include the live preview image

label.title: Label
label.description: Name of the argument in UI

minimum.title: Minimum
minimum.description: Minimum allowed value for the argumentin UI

maximum.title: Minimum
maximum.description: Maximum allowed value for the argumentin UI

step.title: Minimum
step.description: Step for changing value of the argumentin UI

is_alwayson.title: IsAlwayson
is_alwayson.description: Flag specifying whether this script is an alwayson script

is_img2img.title: IsImg2img
is_img2img.description: Flag specifying whether this script is an img2img script

images.title: Image
images.description: The generated image in base64 format.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: The progress with a range of 0 to 1

current_image.title: Current image
current_image.description: The current image in base64 format. opts.show_progress_every_n_steps is required for this to work.

active.title: Whether the task is being worked on right now

queued.title: Whether the task is in queue

completed.title: Whether the task has already finished

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: The progress with a range of 0 to 1

live_preview.title: Live preview image
live_preview.description: Current live preview; a data: uri

id_live_preview.title: Live preview image ID
id_live_preview.description: Send this together with next request to prevent receiving same image
